name: [CONTEST] - Tom Wolf for Governor
subject: Last chance (dinner with Tom)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf6a/73a2bc12/3ede872c/1fcc9dcf/1220296600/VEsH/ "http://wolfforpa.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180217_dinn3_fnd_gq_ful__twg&source=em18_180217_dinn3_fnd_gq_ful__twg") Hey there --

Today's your last chance to win a shot at dinner with Tom.

If you win, we'll pick up the tab for your dinner, transportation, and a place to stay for both you and a friend.

All that's left is for you to enter to win before midnight.

[**Make a contribution of $5 now -- or whatever you can -- and you'll be automatically entered for a chance to win dinner with Tom!**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf6a/73a2bc12/3ede872c/1fcc9dce/1220296600/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-dinnerwithtom?utm_campaign=em18_180217_dinn3_fnd_gq_ful__twg&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&refcode=em18_180217_dinn3_fnd_gq_ful__twg&utm_content=2+-+Make+a+contribution+of+5+now+mdash+or+wh")

In just a short time, you and Tom could be chatting over cheesesteaks, talking over tacos, or deliberating over dumplings. But first, you have to enter to win.

**Don 't miss this opportunity! Chip in $5, or whatever you can, and you'll be automatically entered for a chance to win dinner with Tom:**

[**https://secure.wolfforpa.com/Dinner-with-Tom**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf6a/73a2bc12/3ede872c/1fcc9dcd/1220296600/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-dinnerwithtom?utm_campaign=em18_180217_dinn3_fnd_gq_ful__twg&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&refcode=em18_180217_dinn3_fnd_gq_ful__twg&utm_content=3+-+httpssecurewolfforpacomDinnerwithTom")

Good luck,

Tom Wolf for Governor

| [Enter to Win >>](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf6a/73a2bc12/3ede872c/1fcc9dcc/1220296600/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-dinnerwithtom?utm_campaign=em18_180217_dinn3_fnd_gq_ful__twg&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&refcode=em18_180217_dinn3_fnd_gq_ful__twg&utm_content=4+-+Enter+to+Win+gtgt")
---

NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR CONTRIBUTION NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by February 18, 2018. You may enter by contributing to Tom Wolf for Governor **[here](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf6a/73a2bc12/3ede872c/1fcc9df3/1220296600/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-dinnerwithtom?utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em18_180217_dinn3_fnd_gq_ful__twg&source=em18_180217_dinn3_fnd_gq_ful__twg")** , or to enter without contributing, **[click here](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf6a/73a2bc12/3ede872c/1fcc9df2/1220296600/VEsA/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/meet-tom-for-dinner?utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=6+-+click+here&utm_campaign=em18_180217_dinn3_fnd_gq_ful__twg&source=em18_180217_dinn3_fnd_gq_ful__twg"). **One winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip transportation for winner and a guest from within the fifty U.S. States, Washington, D.C., or Puerto Rico to join Tom Wolf for a special event; hotel accommodations for winner and a guest; (approximate retail value of all prizes $2,000). Odds of winning depend on number of eligible entries received. All prizes will be awarded. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, the District of Columbia, or Puerto Rico and are at least 18 years of age (or an older age of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to****[Official Rules](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf6a/73a2bc12/3ede872c/1fcc9df1/1220296600/VEsB/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/content/Dinner-With-Tom-Rules/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=7+-+Official+Rules&utm_campaign=em18_180217_dinn3_fnd_gq_ful__twg&source=em18_180217_dinn3_fnd_gq_ful__twg")** **and additional restrictions on eligibility.

Sponsor: Tom Wolf for Governor, PO Box 22454, Philadelphia, PA 19110

Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
Contributions or gifts to Tom Wolf for Governor are not tax deductible.

If that is not your preferred email address, you can update your information [here](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf6a/73a2bc12/3ede872c/1fcc9df0/1220296600/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.wolfforpa.com/changeaddress?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em18_180217_dinn3_fnd_gq_ful__twg&source=em18_180217_dinn3_fnd_gq_ful__twg")

[Click here](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf6a/73a2bc12/3ede872c/1fcc9df7/1220296600/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=9+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em18_180217_dinn3_fnd_gq_ful__twg&source=em18_180217_dinn3_fnd_gq_ful__twg") if you would like to unsubscribe from Tom Wolf for Governor email updates.

name: John Kasich
subject: This is just common sense
body:
In case you missed my interview on CNN this morning, I called on
the President and Congress to end the politics and produce common
sense gun laws that make sense

Peter, in case you missed my
interview on CNN this morning, I called on the President and
Congress to end the politics and produce common sense gun laws
that make sense.

We can defend our Second
Amendment while also ensuring that weapons do not end up in the
hands of those who wish to harm others - especially our children!

Please take a moment to watch
this clip and share it on social media if you agree:

Peter, enough with the
politics. Common sense gun reforms make sense. It's time for
action!

Thank you for all that you're
doing.

-John

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/iWpqAj6VHN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/oWpqAj6VHN

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-49627102225-echo3-64543951596624C2DBE02A80E05E0E26@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Sign my pledge
body:
In 2018, I am going to work tirelessly to ensure we elect a Congress that is willing to stand up to the gun lobby.
---
Derek --

I know politicians fear the gun lobby.

But I also know that fear cannot compare to what those innocent children in Florida felt as the gunshots rang out, bullets flew through the halls of their school, and their teachers and classmates were gunned down.

That fear is nothing compared to what parents must have felt waiting in the parking lot of the high school waiting for news about their children.

Our nation's schools should be the safest spaces in our communities. They should not be the place of horror. And while I wish that the scenes from earlier this week were unthinkable or unimaginable, they are not.

We have seen them before, and we will see them again... unless our elected leaders show the courage to act -- the courage to finally take on the gun lobby.

**But that will only happen when politicians realize they have more to fear from all of us together than they do from the gun lobby. And that starts with making our voices heard:**

**[Sign my pledge: "I promise that I will Vote Courage in November and support candidates who will stand up to the gun lobby and take action to make our communities safer from gun violence."](https://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/take-gabbys-pledge?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+Sign+my+pledge+I+promise+that+I+will+Vot&utm_campaign=em_20180218_gg_nd&source=em_20180218_gg_nd")**

For a long time I bought into the fiction that after a horrific shooting, there is a required period of silence -- where we aren't supposed to act. I know people felt that way after I was shot, as well.

But the truth is, the only one who benefits from that waiting period is the gun lobby -- which is why their defenders offer little more than "thoughts and prayers" for the families and condemnations for anyone who demands that our communities deserve more.

In 2018, I am going to work tirelessly to ensure we elect a Congress that is willing to stand up to the gun lobby. And I know the Democratic National Committee will do the same.

**Add your name. Pledge to Vote Courage in 2018:**

**[https://my.democrats.org/Take-the-Pledge](https://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/take-gabbys-pledge?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+httpsmydemocratsorgTakethePledge&utm_campaign=em_20180218_gg_nd&source=em_20180218_gg_nd")**

Every day we fail to take action, we choose this fate. We tolerate politicians who fail to acknowledge this crisis and vote against our safety. We let our gun violence epidemic continue day after deadly day.

This cycle has to end. And it will end... with us.

All my best,

Gabby Giffords

**[SIGN THE PLEDGE](https://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/take-gabbys-pledge?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+SIGN+THE+PLEDGE&utm_campaign=em_20180218_gg_nd&source=em_20180218_gg_nd")**

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405221ef/4067b0a/558ae986b/7e55c88f/1705593885/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180218_gg_nd&source=em_20180218_gg_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405221ef/4067b0a/558ae986b/7e55c88c/1705593885/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180218_gg_nd&source=em_20180218_gg_nd"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405221ef/4067b0a/558ae986b/7e55c88d/1705593885/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180218_gg_nd&source=em_20180218_gg_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405221ef/4067b0a/558ae986b/7e55c88a/1705593885/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180218_gg_nd&source=em_20180218_gg_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
clean_body: In 2018, I am going to work tirelessly to ensure we elect a Congress that is willing to stand up to the gun lobby. Derek -- I know politicians fear the gun lobby. But I also know that fear cannot compare to what those innocent children in Florida felt as the gunshots rang out, bullets flew through the halls of their school, and their teachers and classmates were gunned down. That fear is nothing compared to what parents must have felt waiting in the parking lot of the high school waiting for news about their children. Our nation's schools should be the safest spaces in our communities. They should not be the place of horror. And while I wish that the scenes from earlier this week were unthinkable or unimaginable, they are not. We have seen them before, and we will see them again... unless our elected leaders show the courage to act -- the courage to finally take on the gun lobby. But that will only happen when politicians realize they have more to fear from all of us together than they do from the gun lobby. And that starts with making our voices heard: "" For a long time I bought into the fiction that after a horrific shooting, there is a required period of silence -- where we aren't supposed to act. I know people felt that way after I was shot, as well. But the truth is, the only one who benefits from that waiting period is the gun lobby -- which is why their defenders offer little more than "thoughts and prayers" for the families and condemnations for anyone who demands that our communities deserve more. In 2018, I am going to work tirelessly to ensure we elect a Congress that is willing to stand up to the gun lobby. And I know the Democratic National Committee will do the same. Add your name. Pledge to Vote Courage in 2018: "" Every day we fail to take action, we choose this fate. We tolerate politicians who fail to acknowledge this crisis and vote against our safety. We let our gun violence epidemic continue day after deadly day. This cycle has to end. And it will end... with us. All my best, Gabby Giffords "" Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Team Donnelly
subject: unbelievable (Betsy DeVos)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Our public schools are critical to Indiana. They are where the next generation of Hoosiers will learn and build skills for their futures, and for our kids to thrive, they need to be safe and supported |
---

| | Peter,

Our public schools are critical to Indiana. They are where the next generation of Hoosiers will learn and build skills for their futures, and for our kids to thrive, they need to be safe and supported in their schools.

But Betsy DeVos isn't protecting our children. She abolished defenses for disabled students and slashed protections against sexual assault on campuses. Removing these protections will jeopardize the safety and success of students in Indiana schools -- and we cannot let it stand. **[Sign our petition. Tell Betsy DeVos that putting our kids' safety in jeopardy is unacceptable.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2285/7377f838/33ed3c9a/51fa2044/3336174336/VEsH/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/devosoneyear/?code=donnelly&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjd-devos%3Frefcode%3D0218publicedja%26amount%3D10")**

Joe voted against DeVos because it was always clear she does not consider students her first priority, and now that's more clear than ever. We need leaders in Washington we can depend on, not a Department of Education willing to discard our children's futures. **[Sign on now and tell Betsy DeVos to protect our students!](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2285/7377f838/33ed3c9a/51fa2044/3336174336/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/devosoneyear/?code=donnelly&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjd-devos%3Frefcode%3D0218publicedja%26amount%3D10")**

Thanks,

Team Donnelly | **[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2285/7377f838/33ed3c9a/51fa2047/3336174336/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?refcode=20180218db&amount=25")**
---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2285/7377f838/33ed3c9a/51fa2046/3336174336/VEsC/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")
